title: Automation - when all items in a group have a specific status set status of specific cell to to that status
excerpt:
I have a dashboard with different groups of items. When all ot these items in one group have the status “closed”, I want that a specific cell is set to status “closed” - too 
Please see the attached screenshot für better…

posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Quiksilver

That’s a pretty specific use case. I can’t think of a way to do that with base monday. I am The Monday Man… but my middle name is Integromat.

That’s the route I would go.
